creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've installed www/otter-browser. I removed ~/.config/otter to begin with a clean environment.
When I try to open 'gmail.com':
$ otter-browser
Bus error
Exit 138

The google.com works. I searched 'freebsd' and the first hit (freebsd.org):
$ otter-browser
load glyph failed err=6 face=0x810d09600, glyph=2798
Bus error
Exit 138
